summary: Migrated SecurityVeto cryptographic operations from SHA-256 to SHA-512 across EnhancedSandbox, SecurityVeto, and agent sandbox systems.
description: Migrated SecurityVeto system from SHA-256 to SHA-512 for enhanced security compliance and future-proofing against quantum-resistant cryptography requirements. Updated all related tests to verify SHA-512 correctness and performance.

changes.modification: Changed from SHA-256 to SHA-512 for cryptographic validation
changes.details: Updated all hash computations to use SHA-512 algorithm for enhanced security
Changed cryptographic hash algorithm for all security operations
Security verification now uses SHA-512 for enhanced protection
